notes: Example file. Real labeled set lives in labeled-set.json (gitignored — contains third-party LinkedIn post text).

posts.text:
Let me tell you something that might surprise you.

Last week, I was sitting in a meeting when it hit me — leadership isn't about having all the answers. It's about asking the right questions.

Three things changed how I think:

1. Listen first. Speak second.
2. Curiosity beats certainty.
3. The best leaders build other leaders.

What's been your biggest leadership lesson? Drop it in the comments. 👇
posts.label: ai
posts.notes: Stand-in. Replace with real collected posts in labeled-set.json.

posts.text: spent 2 hours debugging a race condition today. turned out it was an off-by-one in the retry loop. so dumb. anyway, here's a tip: when you have async retries, ALWAYS log the attempt number alongside the result. would have saved me 1.5 of those 2 hours.
posts.label: human

posts.text: Brainstormed this with Claude, then edited in my own voice. The core observation: founders underestimate how much energy goes into context-switching between fundraising and building. Solution that's worked for me — strict 'no investor calls before noon' rule. Mornings stay for the team and the product. Afternoons handle the world.
posts.label: hybrid
posts.notes: Typical workflow: brainstorm with AI, draft with AI assistance, final edit by hand.
